Vatsal K. Gurjar

SUMMARY	___
Full-stack software engineer with hands-on experience building production-grade systems using FastAPI, React 18, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Currently working full-time at Rang Digitech LLC, delivering role-based enterprise applications and AI automation pipelines. Experienced in n8n, LangChain, and OpenAI APIs. Shipped 2 production systems to date, including a role-based Daily Reporting System with KRA analytics, and an AI automation pipeline reducing manual reporting effort across the organization.

Junior Software Engineer, Rang Digitech LLC	Jan 2026 - Present
  Full-time · Vadodara, Gujarat, India · On-site
•	Built a full-stack Daily Reporting System with React 18 + TypeScript + Vite and FastAPI + PostgreSQL, featuring role-based approval workflows, KRA performance analytics, a dynamic template engine, and JWT-secured REST APIs.
•	Implemented JWT authentication, Zustand state management, React Hook Form, and Axios for API integration; used SQLAlchemy 2.0 with Pydantic v2 for schema validation and ORM-based data handling.

  Internship · Vadodara, Gujarat, India · On-site
•	Developed AI automation pipelines using n8n, LangChain, and OpenAI APIs integrated with FastAPI backends, enabling intelligent document processing and automated workflow execution.
•	Engineered end-to-end automation workflows using Python, connecting AI models to business systems via REST APIs; reduced manual reporting effort through scheduled task automation and PostgreSQL-backed data pipelines.
Web Management Head, Hexsociety	Mar 2023 - Oct 2024
  Full-time · Vadodara, Gujarat, India · On-site
•	Led the development of Hexsociety.in, a dynamic community platform using Node.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, fostering connections through forums, events, and collaborative projects with a modern UI/UX.
•	Managed end-to-end technical setup and backend infrastructure for club events; led event hosting, AV coordination, and all tech logistics across 10+ community events over 1.5 years.
Software Developer, MSK   solutions	Feb 2024 - Apr 2024
  Hubballi, Karnataka
•	Built a multi-modal translation system integrating gesture recognition (OpenCV), real-time speech-to-text/text-to-speech, and multilingual translation via Google APIs, enabling accessible communication for the speech and hearing impaired.
PROJECTS	___
Silence Sense: Amplifying silence through communication (A full stack project)	  Sep 2023 - Nov 2023
•	Created “Silent Sense”, a Python-based translation app with Tkinter UI, using OpenCV and Mediapipe for gesture-to-text translation, tailored for the Hearing and Speech Impaired.
•	Implemented APIs and Google Libraries to enhance text-to-speech, speech-to-text and traditional translation features, fostering social inclusion for the deaf and mute community.
Cloverse: AI-Powered Collaborative Learning Platform	                      2024–25
•	Built a full-stack academic platform using React + Vite, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and WebRTC supporting real-time chat, video conferencing, and collaborative document editing for distributed student teams.
•	Integrated OpenAI APIs to power automated note summarization, quiz generation, and AI-driven performance feedback; implemented Auth0 for secure authentication across the platform.
